message:
test(ondisk): add round-trip tests for checksum stamping functions

Add stamp_dir_block_checksum_round_trips_with_verify and
stamp_extent_block_checksum_round_trips_with_verify tests that
construct blocks with valid tail structures, stamp checksums, verify
they pass, then corrupt a byte and verify they fail. Ensures the
stamp_* functions produce checksums that the existing verify_*
functions accept.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
